item.title: Real people pay the price
item.description:
Every kid deserves to be an annoying little shit.
Children are being taught implicitly to be afraid. To stay quiet. The regressive right make up boogeymen and use it to scare children.
A good dad is a good dad.
Felt like this should reach as many eyes as possible.
item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: Apparently lighting wasn't included in the budget
item.description: I'd like David Yates to see this but I think the brightness of the post would hurt his eyes
item.dc:creator: tehtariksghost

item.title: Disgusting. Not surprising.
item.description: An absolutely disgusting display of hyper-partisan behavior by the Republicans. They're really peeved that they/Mitch didn't get to block another SCOTUS nomination by a Democratic president. They don't seem to understand the US Constitution - but we knew that. Only Romney stood and applauded. It's unclear if Murkowski and Collins, who also voted for Jackson, stayed or left. https://www.indy100.com/politics/republicans-angry-jackson-supreme-court EDIT: Just rewatched - Mitch was the first Republican to get up and walk out.
item.dc:creator: RetrogradeLlama

item.title: Make this stop..
item.description: Written by Olha Olifirenko “There are no more families in our country whose fates have not been broken by this war. I am half russian and half Ukrainian by blood, but 100% Ukrainian by heart and citizenship. I have never had any russian documents, and yesterday I blocked my russian father and all my relatives from russia everywhere I could. Yesterday was my russian father's birthday. It was his 60th birthday, and I called him to wish him a peaceful sky. He started telling me some bloody russian propaganda, saying it's the Ukrainian army killing civilians in #Bucha (10 km from my house). I said goodbye to him forever and told him it was our last call. On the 39th or 40th day of the war... Blocking your own parents doesn't seem to be something you're not capable of doing. It hurts. But #Bucha, #Mariupol, #Chernihiv, #Irpen, #Kharkiv, #Enerhodar, #Kyiv and #Ukraine hurts more.. ? #standwithukraine” #fuckputin https://www.linkedin.com/posts/olha-olifirenko_bucha-bucha-mariupol-activity-6917218499387875328-T3sZ
item.dc:creator: FredFlipflop

item.title: Happy beer day!

item.title: This is without doubt the coolest desk I’ve ever seen.
item.description: This desk has not just unbelievable craftsmanship but the attention to detail and the ‘oh I saw that one coming but damn not that’ experience, I don’t know if it was or is a job for him or for him to sell on? but I love it.

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #15
item.description:
Credit to - @DarthGoodguy for this meme!
Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8IwCPIC0xc (Previous fundraiser was here https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u) Thank you to everyone who has sent well wishes, donated, and followed us thus far, we are very grateful for every like, message, and dollar, they make a tremendous difference. * ***EDIT*** - Woke up to a most viral notification and a lot of upvotes and comments, wow. I’m really glad people are enjoying these memes! Thank you guys for the upvotes, the comments, and the donations, they are making a difference. He has no other income, his savings are long since spent, and he’s been waiting on even temporary disability to kick in since he initially left work in December (before his prognosis was updated) and it’s now April. He has applied for a few other emergency aid programs as well through DHS at both a state and local charity level and is still waiting.) Your donations are keeping him housed and fed, keeping his heat on (where we live I won’t be warm enough to turn it off for a month yet), and keeping his necessary prescriptions covered. He has no luxuries, no cable, no WiFi, and he sold his possessions of value. These donations are keeping him alive in a very real sense, and I can thank you guys enough. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 11-https://imgur.com/gallery/Q2WKIPi 12 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkoK6mb 13- https://imgur.com/gallery/A3PI7ur 14- https://imgur.com/gallery/z8a2fuX

item.title: It didn't start with books. It won't end with books.
item.description:
My parents were alive when Emmitt Till was murdered and his killers got paid for doing an interview for a magazine article explaining how they did it.
There are plenty more photos and commemorative postcards like these. Lynching were often community events.
item.dc:creator: forgotiwasfine

item.title: Day 314: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: The Mulberry Street Burger 7oz Beef Patty, Provolone, Hot Cherry Peppers, Prosciutto, Soppressata, Roasted Garlic Aioli, Fresh Grated Parmigiano Reggiano From Black Tap Craft Burgers & Beer In New York, New York Previous Day 313: https://imgur.com/gallery/6DqNjSm MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD

Typical boomer.
A little tighter, champ.
Been there.
Woke.
Some friendly advice when difficult feelings pop up.
I can feel it.
Nature is wild sometimes.

item.title: As a Floridian. More Nikki less Ron
item.description: More Nikki Fried, less Ron DeSantis. Hate to be political but Florida Dems have no ground game here and we continually lose to corrupt Republicans (such as lord Voldemort himself). So this is a Nikki visibility post. Vote in 22. Preferably not for Ron. https://nikkifried.com/ Link as an edit because I thought this post would go nowhere. That’s all. Defeat DeSantis!
item.dc:creator: ThesePipesAreClean

So relatable, I'm blind as a bat
Absolutely me

Cute. I love matching outfits
Always
How accurate is this though?
Happy Friday guys!!

item.title: Scumbags will always exploit the vulnerable
item.description: Fuck humans, we’re such scumbags at times. Sauce: https://www.thenational.scot/news/20039888.homes-ukraine-refugees-reportedly-targeted-exploitation/ Paywalled Times sauce: https://www.thetimes.co.uk/article/female-refugees-seeking-new-homes-after-sexual-advances-by-british-hosts-zsh78cvxm Tabloid sources: https://www.dailyrecord.co.uk/news/scottish-news/ukraine-refugees-homes-for-sex-26610673.amp https://www.mirror.co.uk/news/uk-news/men-offering-homes-ukrainian-women-26609650.amp
